title: UnstableSMP
description: A modpack that attempts to recreate something similar to what is seen in Unstable SMP videos.
body: A modpack that attempts to recreate something similar to what is seen in Unstable SMP videos. This client-side pack focuses on optimization, performance improvements, and quality-of-life enhancements, allowing players to experience the game smoothly while capturing the feel and style of the Unstable SMP series. It’s designed for fans who want the same visual and gameplay vibes as Wemmbu, Flame, Spoke, and Parrot’s adventures, without affecting server performance.
